# Whyzer.ai

Whyzer is an AI-powered Point of View (POV) platform for enterprise B2B sellers.

## Core Value
Transforms SEC filings, earnings call transcripts, and financial data into 
boardroom-ready Points of View — helping AEs speak to executive priorities.

## Key Features
- AI-generated Master Dossier (overview, KPIs, POVs, next steps)
- Financial KPI extraction from 10-K and 10-Q filings
- 3–5 executive-ready Points of View per account
- C-suite and board member quote extraction
- AI-generated podcast summaries of earnings calls
- Coach Jamal — AI sales co-pilot

## Pricing
- Premium: $57/month or $47/month (annual)
- Elite: $97/month or $83/month (annual)
- Corporate: Custom

## Free Tier
Full access for 3 accounts. No credit card required.

## Founded by
Jamal Reimer — Top 0.1% Oracle seller globally, $160M+ SaaS closed.

## Links
Homepage: https://www.whyzer.ai
Elite: https://www.whyzer.ai/elite
